seo.title: Building Content Generation with Pydantic AI + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build content generation with Pydantic AI + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Pydantic AI enables type-safe, structured AI agents for production-grade content generation, ensuring outputs adhere to schemas for brand voice and editorial standards. Guardrails are essential to catch subtle drifts in tone, factual inaccuracies, or SEO non-compliance that validators might miss. Vex integrates seamlessly as a result validator to provide runtime reliability monitoring and automated recovery.

architectureOverview.heading: Content Generation Architecture with Pydantic AI
architectureOverview.description:
The architecture starts with a user request defining content parameters (topic, length, tone). A Pydantic AI agent orchestrates an LLM call with a structured output schema enforcing brand voice and editorial guidelines. Nested tools handle fact-checking via search APIs and originality scans, with result validators ensuring compliance before final assembly.

Streaming responses are validated incrementally to catch mid-generation failures. Dependency injection provides context like brand guidelines across tool calls. The final output is a validated Content object ready for publication.

Vex sits as a result_validator on agent.run(), monitoring for common failure modes like validator rejections and providing observability into nested tool reliability.

risks.name: Brand voice drift in long-form generation
risks.description: LLM produces content that technically validates but deviates from brand personality metrics
risks.mitigation: Vex semantic similarity checks against brand voice corpus

risks.name: Fact-checking tool timeouts masking hallucinations
risks.description: Retry logic hides persistent factual errors during nested verification
risks.mitigation: Vex timeout escalation and hallucination detection

risks.name: Streaming validation failures mid-generation
risks.description: Partial structured outputs fail schema validation, losing entire generation
risks.mitigation: Vex incremental streaming validation with recovery prompts

risks.name: SEO compliance drift from editorial guidelines
risks.description: Content passes syntax validation but violates keyword density or readability rules
risks.mitigation: Vex multi-metric SEO scoring integrated as result validator

implementation.title: Define Content Generation Schema
implementation.description: Create Pydantic models for structured content output with brand constraints
implementation.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from pydantic_ai import Agent, Result
from typing import List

class BrandVoice(BaseModel):
    tone: str = Field(..., description="brand tone: professional|casual|authoritative")
    personality: List[str] = Field(default_factory=list)

class ContentBlock(BaseModel):
    text: str
    fact_score: float = Field(ge=0.9, le=1.0)
    originality: float = Field(ge=0.85)

class GeneratedContent(BaseModel):
    title: str
    body: List[ContentBlock]
    seo_score: float = Field(ge=0.8)
    brand_voice: BrandVoice

implementation.title: Fact-Checking Tool Implementation
implementation.description: Nested tool for verifying claims against authoritative sources

implementation.title: Brand Voice Agent Orchestration
implementation.description: Main agent coordinating content generation with validation
implementation.code:
content_agent = Agent(
    'content_generator',
    model='gpt-4o',
    result_model=GeneratedContent,
    tools=[fact_check],
    instructions="""Generate brand-compliant content.
    Enforce professional tone. Verify all facts >90% confidence.
    Target SEO score >0.8 with natural keywords."""
)

async def generate_content(topic: str, tone: str) -> GeneratedContent:
    result = await content_agent.run(f"Write 800 words on {topic} in {tone} voice")
    return result.unwrap()

implementation.title: SEO Compliance Validator
implementation.description: Custom validator ensuring keyword optimization and readability

vexIntegration.title: Add Vex Result Validator to Agent
vexIntegration.description: Integrate Vex as primary result validator catching validator rejections
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import Vex, Guardrail

vex = Vex(api_key="your-vex-key")

# Define content generation guardrails
content_guardrails = [
    Guardrail.brand_voice(
        reference_corpus="your-brand-voice-samples.txt",
        similarity_threshold=0.85
    ),
    Guardrail.factual_accuracy(min_confidence=0.9),
    Guardrail.seo_compliance([
        "keyword_density>1%",
        "readability>flesch_8"
    ])
]

# Attach to agent
content_agent.add_result_validator(
    lambda result: vex.validate(
        result,
        guardrails=content_guardrails,
        context={"topic": topic, "brand": "professional"}
    )
)

vexIntegration.title: Monitor Nested Tool Reliability
vexIntegration.description: Track fact-checking tool failures and escalate persistent errors
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import ToolMonitor

# Wrap tools with Vex monitoring
tool_monitor = ToolMonitor(vex)

@tool_monitor.track(name="fact_check")
@tool
async def fact_check(claims: List[str]) -> dict:
    result = await perform_fact_check(claims)  # your impl
    if not result['all_verified']:
        raise ValueError("Fact check failed")
    return result

# Vex auto-escalates after 3 tool failures
content_agent.max_tool_retries = 3

vexIntegration.title: Streaming Validation with Recovery
vexIntegration.description: Validate streaming chunks and auto-recover from mid-generation failures
vexIntegration.code:
async def generate_with_streaming(topic: str):
    stream = content_agent.stream(f"Write on {topic}")
    
    async for chunk in stream:
        validation = vex.validate_stream_chunk(
            chunk,
            guardrails=content_guardrails,
            stream_id="content-gen-123"
        )
        
        if not validation.valid:
            # Auto-recovery with corrected prompt
            recovery_prompt = f"Fix: {validation.error}. Continue generation."
            await content_agent.patch_stream(recovery_prompt)
        
    return await stream.finalize()
